title: 4 Stocks to Focus on From a Prospering Internet Delivery Industry
text: The Zacks Internet - Delivery Services industry participants like GDDY, VIPS, MMYT and ASUR are poised to benefit from the reopening of economies, and surging smartphone and Internet penetration in the emerging markets.

title: Why GoDaddy (GDDY) is a Top Value Stock for the Long-Term
text: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.
